messages.content:
你是专业的游戏开发 AI 助手。
**固定 UI 规范（必须严格遵守）**：
1. Canvas 尺寸：width=360, height=640（9:16 竖屏）
2. 背景：深色渐变 linear-gradient(180deg, #1a1a2e 0%, #16213e 100%)
3. 字体：PingFang SC, Microsoft YaHei, sans-serif
4. 圆角：12px（canvas 和 UI 元素）
5. 阴影：0 8px 32px rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.4)
6. 得分显示：顶部居中，白色文字，青色数值（#4fd1c5）
7. 整体风格：现代、简洁、深色主题

**固定代码结构（必须遵守）**：
1. 必须有 update(deltaTime) 函数 - 游戏逻辑更新
2. 必须有 render() 函数 - 游戏渲染
3. 必须有 handleInput(key, pressed) 函数 - 输入处理
4. 使用 requestAnimationFrame 游戏循环
5. 得分系统使用 localStorage 保存最高分
6. 游戏状态：menu, playing, paused, gameover

**累加修改规则（多轮对话时必须遵守）**：
1. 保留所有现有功能 - 绝不删除已有代码
2. 只添加新功能，不修改现有逻辑
3. 保持变量命名一致
4. 保持代码风格一致
5. 保持 UI 风格完全一致
6. 如果用户要求修改，先保留核心功能，再调整

                    
当前任务：创建新游戏。
请严格按照上述规范创建游戏，确保 UI 风格和代码结构符合标准。

请创建一个完整的 HTML5 游戏。游戏描述：蛇可以穿墙，这头进，那头出。
                    
重要技术要求：
1. 单个 HTML 文件
2. 使用 Canvas API
3. Canvas 尺寸必须为 360x640 像素（9:16 竖屏比例）
4. 在 JavaScript 中设置：canvas.width = 360; canvas.height = 640;
5. 在 CSS 中设置：canvas { max-width: 100%; height: auto; display: block; margin: 0 auto; }
6. 包含完整游戏循环
7. 有得分系统
8. 确保有趣可玩

只返回 HTML 代码，不要其他说明。

prompt: 你是专业的游戏开发 AI 助手。
gameCode:
<!DOCTYPE html>
<html lang="en">
<head>
    <meta charset="UTF-8">
    <meta name="viewport" content="width=device-width, initial-scale=1.0">
    <title>穿墙贪吃蛇</title>
    <style>
        * {
            margin: 0;
            padding: 0;
            box-sizing: border-box;
        }
        body {
            background: linear-gradient(180deg, #1a1a2e 0%, #16213e 100%);
            min-height: 100vh;
            display: flex;
            justify-content: center;
            align-items: center;
            font-family: PingFang SC, Microsoft YaHei, sans-serif;
        }
        canvas {
            max-width: 100%;
            height: auto;
            display: block;
            margin: 0 auto;
            border-radius: 12px;
            box-shadow: 0 8px 32px rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.4);
        }
    </style>
</head>
<body>
    <canvas id="gameCanvas"></canvas>
    <script>
        const canvas = document.getElementById('gameCanvas');
        const ctx = canvas.getContext('2d');

        canvas.width = 360;
        canvas.height = 640;

        // 游戏状态
        const MENU = 'menu';
        const PLAYING = 'playing';
        const PAUSED = 'paused';
        const GAMEOVER = 'gameover';

        let gameState = MENU;

        // 蛇
        let snake = [];
        let snakeDirection = { x: 1, y: 0 };
        let nextDirection = { x: 1, y: 0 };

        // 食物
        let food = { x: 0, y: 0 };

        // 得分
        let score = 0;
        let highScore = localStorage.getItem('snakeHighScore') || 0;

        // 网格大小
        const GRID_SIZE = 10;
        const GRID_WIDTH = canvas.width / GRID_SIZE;
        const GRID_HEIGHT = canvas.height / GRID_SIZE;

        // 游戏速度
        let lastTime = 0;
        let moveInterval = 200;
        let timeSinceLastMove = 0;

        // 初始化游戏
        function initGame() {
            snake = [
                { x: Math.floor(GRID_WIDTH / 2), y: Math.floor(GRID_HEIGHT / 2) },
                { x: Math.floor(GRID_WIDTH / 2) - 1, y: Math.floor(GRID_HEIGHT / 2) },
                { x: Math.floor(GRID_WIDTH / 2) - 2, y: Math.floor(GRID_HEIGHT / 2) }
            ];
            snakeDirection = { x: 1, y: 0 };
            nextDirection = { x: 1, y: 0 };
            score = 0;
            placeFood();
        }

        // 放置食物
        function placeFood() {
            do {
                food.x = Math.floor(Math.random() * GRID_WIDTH);
                food.y = Math.floor(Math.random() * GRID_HEIGHT);
            } while (snake.some(segment => segment.x === food.x && segment.y === food.y));
        }

        // 更新函数
        function update(deltaTime) {
            if (gameState !== PLAYING) return;

            timeSinceLastMove += deltaTime;
            if (timeSinceLastMove >= moveInterval) {
                timeSinceLastMove = 0;

                snakeDirection = { ...nextDirection };

                let newHead = {
                    x: snake[0].x + snakeDirection.x,
                    y: snake[0].y + snakeDirection.y
                };

                // 穿墙逻辑
                if (newHead.x < 0) newHead.x = GRID_WIDTH - 1;
                if (newHead.x >= GRID_WIDTH) newHead.x = 0;
                if (newHead.y < 0) newHead.y = GRID_HEIGHT - 1;
                if (newHead.y >= GRID_HEIGHT) newHead.y = 0;

                // 检查是否吃到自己
                if (snake.some(segment => segment.x === newHead.x && segment.y === newHead.y)) {
                    gameState = GAMEOVER;
                    if (score > highScore) {
                        highScore = score;
                        localStorage.setItem('snakeHighScore', highScore);
                    }
                    return;
                }

                snake.unshift(newHead);

                // 检查是否吃到食物
                if (newHead.x === food.x && newHead.y === food.y) {
                    score++;
                    placeFood();
                } else {
                    snake.pop();
                }
            }
        }

        // 渲染函数
        function render() {
            ctx.clearRect(0, 0, canvas.width, canvas.height);

            // 绘制背景
            const gradient = ctx.createLinearGradient(0, 0, 0, canvas.height);
            gradient.addColorStop(0, '#1a1a2e');
            gradient.addColorStop(1, '#16213e');
            ctx.fillStyle = gradient;
            ctx.fillRect(0, 0, canvas.width, canvas.height);

            // 设置字体
            ctx.font = '20px PingFang SC, Microsoft YaHei, sans-serif';

            // 绘制得分
            ctx.fillStyle = 'white';
            ctx.textAlign = 'center';
            ctx.fillText('得分: ', canvas.width / 2 - 30, 30);
            ctx.fillStyle = '#4fd1c5';
            ctx.fillText(score, canvas.width / 2 + 20, 30);

            // 绘制最高分
            ctx.fillStyle = 'white';
            ctx.fillText('最高分: ', canvas.width / 2 - 40, 60);
            ctx.fillStyle = '#4fd1c5';
            ctx.fillText(highScore, canvas.width / 2 + 30, 60);

            if (gameState === MENU) {
                ctx.fillStyle = 'white';
                ctx.font = '30px PingFang SC, Microsoft YaHei, sans-serif';
                ctx.fillText('穿墙贪吃蛇', canvas.width / 2, canvas.height / 2 - 50);
                ctx.font = '20px PingFang SC, Microsoft YaHei, sans-serif';
                ctx.fillText('按空格键开始游戏', canvas.width / 2, canvas.height / 2);
                ctx.fillText('使用方向键控制蛇', canvas.width / 2, canvas.height / 2 + 40);
            } else if (gameState === PLAYING || gameState === PAUSED) {
                // 绘制食物
                ctx.fillStyle = '#ff6b6b';
                ctx.fillRect(food.x * GRID_SIZE, food.y * GRID_SIZE, GRID_SIZE, GRID_SIZE);

                // 绘制蛇
                snake.forEach((segment, index) => {
                    if (index === 0) {
                        ctx.fillStyle = '#4fd1c5';
                    } else {
                        ctx.fillStyle = '#68d391';
                    }
                    ctx.fillRect(segment.x * GRID_SIZE, segment.y * GRID_SIZE, GRID_SIZE, GRID_SIZE);
                });

                if (gameState === PAUSED) {
                    ctx.fillStyle = 'rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.5)';
                    ctx.fillRect(0, 0, canvas.width, canvas.height);
                    ctx.fillStyle = 'white';
                    ctx.font = '30px PingFang SC, Microsoft YaHei, sans-serif';
                    ctx.fillText('游戏暂停', canvas.width / 2, canvas.height / 2);
                    ctx.font = '20px PingFang SC, Microsoft YaHei, sans-serif';
                    ctx.fillText('按空格键继续', canvas.width / 2, canvas.height / 2 + 40);
                }
            } else if (gameState === GAMEOVER) {
                ctx.fillStyle = 'rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.7)';
                ctx.fillRect(0, 0, canvas.width, canvas.height);
                ctx.fillStyle = 'white';
                ctx.font = '30px PingFang SC, Microsoft YaHei, sans-serif';
                ctx.fillText('游戏结束', canvas.width / 2, canvas.height / 2 - 50);
                ctx.font = '20px PingFang SC, Microsoft YaHei, sans-serif';
                ctx.fillText(`得分: ${score}`, canvas.width / 2, canvas.height / 2);
                ctx.fillText(`最高分: ${highScore}`, canvas.width / 2, canvas.height / 2 + 40);
                ctx.fillText('按空格键重新开始', canvas.width / 2, canvas.height / 2 + 80);
            }
        }

        // 输入处理
        function handleInput(key, pressed) {
            if (!pressed) return;

            if (gameState === MENU && key === ' ') {
                gameState = PLAYING;
                initGame();
            } else if (gameState === PLAYING) {
                switch (key) {
                    case 'ArrowUp':
                        if (snakeDirection.y !== 1) nextDirection = { x: 0, y: -1 };
                        break;
                    case 'ArrowDown':
                        if (snakeDirection.y !== -1) nextDirection = { x: 0, y: 1 };
                        break;
                    case 'ArrowLeft':
                        if (snakeDirection.x !== 1) nextDirection = { x: -1, y: 0 };
                        break;
                    case 'ArrowRight':
                        if (snakeDirection.x !== -1) nextDirection = { x: 1, y: 0 };
                        break;
                    case ' ':
                        gameState = PAUSED;
                        break;
                }
            } else if (gameState === PAUSED && key === ' ') {
                gameState = PLAYING;
            } else if (gameState === GAMEOVER && key === ' ') {
                gameState = PLAYING;
                initGame();
            }
        }

        // 游戏循环
        function gameLoop(currentTime) {
            const deltaTime = currentTime - lastTime;
            lastTime = currentTime;

            update(deltaTime);
            render();

            requestAnimationFrame(gameLoop);
        }

        // 事件监听
        document.addEventListener('keydown', (event) => {
            handleInput(event.key, true);
        });

        // 初始化
        initGame();
        lastTime = performance.now();
        requestAnimationFrame(gameLoop);
    </script>
</body>
</html>

<!DOCTYPE html>
<html lang="en">
<head>
    <meta charset="UTF-8">
    <meta name="viewport" content="width=device-width, initial-scale=1.0">
    <title>穿墙贪吃蛇</title>
    <style>
        * {
            margin: 0;
            padding: 0;
            box-sizing: border-box;
        }
        body {
            background: linear-gradient(180deg, #1a1a2e 0%, #16213e 100%);
            min-height: 100vh;
            display: flex;
            justify-content: center;
            align-items: center;
            font-family: PingFang SC, Microsoft YaHei, sans-serif;
        }
        canvas {
            max-width: 100%;
            height: auto;
            display: block;
            margin: 0 auto;
            border-radius: 12px;
            box-shadow: 0 8px 32px rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.4);
        }
    </style>
</head>
<body>
    <canvas id="gameCanvas"></canvas>
    <script>
        const canvas = document.getElementById('gameCanvas');
        const ctx = canvas.getContext('2d');

        canvas.height = 640;

        let snake = [];

        let nextDirection = { x: 1, y: 0 };

        let food = { x: 0, y: 0 };

        // 得分
        let score = 0;
        let highScore = localStorage.getItem('snakeHighScore') || 0;

        const GRID_SIZE = 10;
        const GRID_WIDTH = canvas.width / GRID_SIZE;
        const GRID_HEIGHT = canvas.height / GRID_SIZE;

        let lastTime = 0;
        let moveInterval = 200;
        let timeSinceLastMove = 0;

        // 初始化游戏
        function initGame() {
            snake = [
                { x: Math.floor(GRID_WIDTH / 2), y: Math.floor(GRID_HEIGHT / 2) },
                { x: Math.floor(GRID_WIDTH / 2) - 1, y: Math.floor(GRID_HEIGHT / 2) },
                { x: Math.floor(GRID_WIDTH / 2) - 2, y: Math.floor(GRID_HEIGHT / 2) }
            ];
            snakeDirection = { x: 1, y: 0 };
            nextDirection = { x: 1, y: 0 };
            score = 0;
            placeFood();
        }

        // 放置食物
        function placeFood() {
            do {
                food.x = Math.floor(Math.random() * GRID_WIDTH);
                food.y = Math.floor(Math.random() * GRID_HEIGHT);
            } while (snake.some(segment => segment.x === food.x && segment.y === food.y));
        }

        // 更新函数
        function update(deltaTime) {
            if (gameState !== PLAYING) return;

            timeSinceLastMove += deltaTime;
            if (timeSinceLastMove >= moveInterval) {
                timeSinceLastMove = 0;

                snakeDirection = { ...nextDirection };

                let newHead = {
                    x: snake[0].x + snakeDirection.x,
                    y: snake[0].y + snakeDirection.y
                };

                // 穿墙逻辑
                if (newHead.x < 0) newHead.x = GRID_WIDTH - 1;
                if (newHead.x >= GRID_WIDTH) newHead.x = 0;
                if (newHead.y < 0) newHead.y = GRID_HEIGHT - 1;
                if (newHead.y >= GRID_HEIGHT) newHead.y = 0;

                // 检查是否吃到自己
                if (snake.some(segment => segment.x === newHead.x && segment.y === newHead.y)) {
                    gameState = GAMEOVER;
                    if (score > highScore) {
                        highScore = score;
                        localStorage.setItem('snakeHighScore', highScore);
                    }
                    return;
                }

                snake.unshift(newHead);

                // 检查是否吃到食物
                if (newHead.x === food.x && newHead.y === food.y) {
                    score++;
                    placeFood();
                } else {
                    snake.pop();
                }
            }
        }

        // 渲染函数
        function render() {
            ctx.clearRect(0, 0, canvas.width, canvas.height);

            // 绘制背景
            const gradient = ctx.createLinearGradient(0, 0, 0, canvas.height);
            gradient.addColorStop(0, '#1a1a2e');
            gradient.addColorStop(1, '#16213e');
            ctx.fillStyle = gradient;
            ctx.fillRect(0, 0, canvas.width, canvas.height);

            // 设置字体
            ctx.font = '20px PingFang SC, Microsoft YaHei, sans-serif';

            // 绘制得分
            ctx.fillStyle = 'white';
            ctx.textAlign = 'center';
            ctx.fillText('得分: ', canvas.width / 2 - 30, 30);
            ctx.fillStyle = '#4fd1c5';
            ctx.fillText(score, canvas.width / 2 + 20, 30);

            // 绘制最高分
            ctx.fillStyle = 'white';
            ctx.fillText('最高分: ', canvas.width / 2 - 40, 60);
            ctx.fillStyle = '#4fd1c5';
            ctx.fillText(highScore, canvas.width / 2 + 30, 60);

            if (gameState === MENU) {
                ctx.fillStyle = 'white';
                ctx.font = '30px PingFang SC, Microsoft YaHei, sans-serif';
                ctx.fillText('穿墙贪吃蛇', canvas.width / 2, canvas.height / 2 - 50);
                ctx.font = '20px PingFang SC, Microsoft YaHei, sans-serif';
                ctx.fillText('按空格键开始游戏', canvas.width / 2, canvas.height / 2);
                ctx.fillText('使用方向键控制蛇', canvas.width / 2, canvas.height / 2 + 40);
            } else if (gameState === PLAYING || gameState === PAUSED) {
                // 绘制食物
                ctx.fillStyle = '#ff6b6b';
                ctx.fillRect(food.x * GRID_SIZE, food.y * GRID_SIZE, GRID_SIZE, GRID_SIZE);

                // 绘制蛇
                snake.forEach((segment, index) => {
                    if (index === 0) {
                        ctx.fillStyle = '#4fd1c5';
                    } else {
                        ctx.fillStyle = '#68d391';
                    }
                    ctx.fillRect(segment.x * GRID_SIZE, segment.y * GRID_SIZE, GRID_SIZE, GRID_SIZE);
                });

                if (gameState === PAUSED) {
                    ctx.fillStyle = 'rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.5)';
                    ctx.fillRect(0, 0, canvas.width, canvas.height);
                    ctx.fillStyle = 'white';
                    ctx.font = '30px PingFang SC, Microsoft YaHei, sans-serif';
                    ctx.fillText('游戏暂停', canvas.width / 2, canvas.height / 2);
                    ctx.font = '20px PingFang SC, Microsoft YaHei, sans-serif';
                    ctx.fillText('按空格键继续', canvas.width / 2, canvas.height / 2 + 40);
                }
            } else if (gameState === GAMEOVER) {
                ctx.fillStyle = 'rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.7)';
                ctx.fillRect(0, 0, canvas.width, canvas.height);
                ctx.fillStyle = 'white';
                ctx.font = '30px PingFang SC, Microsoft YaHei, sans-serif';
                ctx.fillText('游戏结束', canvas.width / 2, canvas.height / 2 - 50);
                ctx.font = '20px PingFang SC, Microsoft YaHei, sans-serif';
                ctx.fillText(`得分: ${score}`, canvas.width / 2, canvas.height / 2);
                ctx.fillText(`最高分: ${highScore}`, canvas.width / 2, canvas.height / 2 + 40);
                ctx.fillText('按空格键重新开始', canvas.width / 2, canvas.height / 2 + 80);
            }
        }

        // 输入处理
        function handleInput(key, pressed) {
            if (!pressed) return;

            if (gameState === MENU && key === ' ') {
                gameState = PLAYING;
                initGame();
            } else if (gameState === PLAYING) {
                switch (key) {
                    case 'ArrowUp':
                        if (snakeDirection.y !== 1) nextDirection = { x: 0, y: -1 };
                        break;
                    case 'ArrowDown':
                        if (snakeDirection.y !== -1) nextDirection = { x: 0, y: 1 };
                        break;
                    case 'ArrowLeft':
                        if (snakeDirection.x !== 1) nextDirection = { x: -1, y: 0 };
                        break;
                    case 'ArrowRight':
                        if (snakeDirection.x !== -1) nextDirection = { x: 1, y: 0 };
                        break;
                    case ' ':
                        gameState = PAUSED;
                        break;
                }
            } else if (gameState === PAUSED && key === ' ') {
                gameState = PLAYING;
            } else if (gameState === GAMEOVER && key === ' ') {
                gameState = PLAYING;
                initGame();
            }
        }

        // 游戏循环
        function gameLoop(currentTime) {
            const deltaTime = currentTime - lastTime;
            lastTime = currentTime;

            update(deltaTime);
            render();

            requestAnimationFrame(gameLoop);
        }

        // 事件监听
        document.addEventListener('keydown', (event) => {
            handleInput(event.key, true);
        });

        // 初始化
        initGame();
        lastTime = performance.now();
        requestAnimationFrame(gameLoop);
    </script>
</body>
</html>

<!DOCTYPE html>
<html lang="en">
<head>
    <meta charset="UTF-8">
    <meta name="viewport" content="width=device-width, initial-scale=1.0">
    <title>穿墙贪吃蛇</title>
    <style>
        * {
            margin: 0;
            padding: 0;
            box-sizing: border-box;
        }
        body {
            background: linear-gradient(180deg, #1a1a2e 0%, #16213e 100%);

            justify-content: center;
            align-items: center;
            font-family: PingFang SC, Microsoft YaHei, sans-serif;
        }

            max-width: 100%;
            height: auto;
            display: block;
            margin: 0 auto;

        }
    </style>

                { x: Math.floor(GRID_WIDTH / 2) - 2, y: Math.floor(GRID_HEIGHT / 2) }

                timeSinceLastMove = 0;

                if (newHead.x < 0) newHead.x = GRID_WIDTH - 1;
                if (newHead.x >= GRID_WIDTH) newHead.x = 0;
                if (newHead.y < 0) newHead.y = GRID_HEIGHT - 1;
                if (newHead.y >= GRID_HEIGHT) newHead.y = 0;

                // 检查是否吃到自己

                    gameState = GAMEOVER;
                    if (score > highScore) {
                        highScore = score;
                        localStorage.setItem('snakeHighScore', highScore);
                    }
                    return;
                }

                snake.unshift(newHead);

                // 检查是否吃到食物
                if (newHead.x === food.x && newHead.y === food.y) {
                    score++;
                    placeFood();
                } else {
                    snake.pop();
                }
            }
        }

        // 渲染函数
        function render() {
            ctx.clearRect(0, 0, canvas.width, canvas.height);

            // 绘制背景
            const gradient = ctx.createLinearGradient(0, 0, 0, canvas.height);
            gradient.addColorStop(0, '#1a1a2e');
            gradient.addColorStop(1, '#16213e');
            ctx.fillStyle = gradient;
            ctx.fillRect(0, 0, canvas.width, canvas.height);

            // 设置字体
            ctx.font = '20px PingFang SC, Microsoft YaHei, sans-serif';

            // 绘制得分
            ctx.fillStyle = 'white';
            ctx.textAlign = 'center';
            ctx.fillText('得分: ', canvas.width / 2 - 30, 30);
            ctx.fillStyle = '#4fd1c5';
            ctx.fillText(score, canvas.width / 2 + 20, 30);

            // 绘制最高分
            ctx.fillStyle = 'white';
            ctx.fillText('最高分: ', canvas.width / 2 - 40, 60);
            ctx.fillStyle = '#4fd1c5';
            ctx.fillText(highScore, canvas.width / 2 + 30, 60);

            if (gameState === MENU) {
                ctx.fillStyle = 'white';
                ctx.font = '30px PingFang SC, Microsoft YaHei, sans-serif';
                ctx.fillText('穿墙贪吃蛇', canvas.width / 2, canvas.height / 2 - 50);
                ctx.font = '20px PingFang SC, Microsoft YaHei, sans-serif';
                ctx.fillText('按空格键开始游戏', canvas.width / 2, canvas.height / 2);
                ctx.fillText('使用方向键控制蛇', canvas.width / 2, canvas.height / 2 + 40);
            } else if (gameState === PLAYING || gameState === PAUSED) {
                // 绘制食物
                ctx.fillStyle = '#ff6b6b';
                ctx.fillRect(food.x * GRID_SIZE, food.y * GRID_SIZE, GRID_SIZE, GRID_SIZE);

                // 绘制蛇
                snake.forEach((segment, index) => {
                    if (index === 0) {
                        ctx.fillStyle = '#4fd1c5';
                    } else {
                        ctx.fillStyle = '#68d391';
                    }
                    ctx.fillRect(segment.x * GRID_SIZE, segment.y * GRID_SIZE, GRID_SIZE, GRID_SIZE);
                });

                if (gameState === PAUSED) {
                    ctx.fillStyle = 'rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.5)';
                    ctx.fillRect(0, 0, canvas.width, canvas.height);
                    ctx.fillStyle = 'white';
                    ctx.font = '30px PingFang SC, Microsoft YaHei, sans-serif';
                    ctx.fillText('游戏暂停', canvas.width / 2, canvas.height / 2);
                    ctx.font = '20px PingFang SC, Microsoft YaHei, sans-serif';
                    ctx.fillText('按空格键继续', canvas.width / 2, canvas.height / 2 + 40);
                }
            } else if (gameState === GAMEOVER) {
                ctx.fillStyle = 'rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.7)';
                ctx.fillRect(0, 0, canvas.width, canvas.height);
                ctx.fillStyle = 'white';
                ctx.font = '30px PingFang SC, Microsoft YaHei, sans-serif';
                ctx.fillText('游戏结束', canvas.width / 2, canvas.height / 2 - 50);
                ctx.font = '20px PingFang SC, Microsoft YaHei, sans-serif';
                ctx.fillText(`得分: ${score}`, canvas.width / 2, canvas.height / 2);
                ctx.fillText(`最高分: ${highScore}`, canvas.width / 2, canvas.height / 2 + 40);
                ctx.fillText('按空格键重新开始', canvas.width / 2, canvas.height / 2 + 80);
            }
        }

        // 输入处理
        function handleInput(key, pressed) {
            if (!pressed) return;

            if (gameState === MENU && key === ' ') {
                gameState = PLAYING;
                initGame();
            } else if (gameState === PLAYING) {
                switch (key) {
                    case 'ArrowUp':
                        if (snakeDirection.y !== 1) nextDirection = { x: 0, y: -1 };
                        break;
                    case 'ArrowDown':
                        if (snakeDirection.y !== -1) nextDirection = { x: 0, y: 1 };
                        break;
                    case 'ArrowLeft':
                        if (snakeDirection.x !== 1) nextDirection = { x: -1, y: 0 };
                        break;
                    case 'ArrowRight':
                        if (snakeDirection.x !== -1) nextDirection = { x: 1, y: 0 };
                        break;
                    case ' ':
                        gameState = PAUSED;
                        break;
                }
            } else if (gameState === PAUSED && key === ' ') {
                gameState = PLAYING;
            } else if (gameState === GAMEOVER && key === ' ') {
                gameState = PLAYING;
                initGame();
            }
        }

        // 游戏循环
        function gameLoop(currentTime) {
            const deltaTime = currentTime - lastTime;
            lastTime = currentTime;

            update(deltaTime);
            render();

            requestAnimationFrame(gameLoop);
        }

        // 事件监听
        document.addEventListener('keydown', (event) => {
            handleInput(event.key, true);
        });

        // 初始化
        initGame();
        lastTime = performance.now();
        requestAnimationFrame(gameLoop);
    </script>
</body>
</html>
